# Introduction {#sec-intro}

We study a theorem in $L^2$ spaces and refer ahead to [Theorem 2.1](#thm-main).

> Theorem 2.1 (Main result) {#thm-main}
> Let $T$ be compact. Then $T$ sends bounded sets to relatively compact sets.

## Notes

::: lemma {#lem-bounded}
Lemma 2.2.
By [Theorem 2.1](#thm-main), every convergent sequence is bounded.
:::
